questions.question: Where was A.P.J. Abdul Kalam born?
questions.answer: He was born in Rameswaram, Tamil Nadu.

questions.question: What did Kalam enjoy doing as a child?
questions.answer: He enjoyed reading books and newspapers.

questions.question: Who were Kalam’s parents?
questions.answer: His father was Jainulabdeen, and his mother was Ashiamma.

questions.question: How did Kalam help his father in childhood?
questions.answer: He helped his father in selling newspapers.

questions.question: What subject interested Kalam the most at school?
questions.answer: He was most interested in mathematics.

questions.question: How did Kalam travel to school?
questions.answer: He often walked long distances to reach school.

questions.question: Which games did Kalam enjoy playing?
questions.answer: He enjoyed playing cricket and marbles.

questions.question: What was Kalam’s habit that impressed his teachers?
questions.answer: He was disciplined and punctual.

questions.question: Who inspired Kalam to dream big?
questions.answer: His parents and teachers inspired him to dream big.

questions.question: Which book left a deep impression on young Kalam?
questions.answer: He was deeply influenced by the biography of famous scientists.

questions.question: What kind of student was Kalam?
questions.answer: He was hardworking and curious.

questions.question: What was Kalam’s attitude towards knowledge?
questions.answer: He was eager to learn and explore new things.

questions.question: How did Kalam show respect to elders?
questions.answer: He listened carefully and followed their advice.

questions.question: What was Kalam’s first ambition?
questions.answer: He wanted to become a pilot.

questions.question: Who were Kalam’s friends in childhood?
questions.answer: He had friends from his neighborhood and school.

questions.question: What lesson did Kalam learn from selling newspapers?
questions.answer: He learned the value of hard work and responsibility.

questions.question: How did Kalam spend his leisure time?
questions.answer: He spent time reading and playing games.

questions.question: What did Kalam admire in his teachers?
questions.answer: He admired their knowledge and dedication.

questions.question: Why did Kalam wake up early in the morning?
questions.answer: To help his father and prepare for school.

questions.question: Which quality of Kalam’s childhood helped him succeed later?
questions.answer: His curiosity and determination.

questions.question: How did Kalam react to difficulties in his childhood?
questions.answer: He faced them bravely and with patience.

questions.question: What role did Kalam’s parents play in his education?
questions.answer: They encouraged him to study and nurtured his interests.

questions.question: Name a hobby of Kalam that showed his curiosity.
questions.answer: Reading books on science and technology.

questions.question: How did Kalam balance studies and other activities?
questions.answer: He managed his time to study, play, and help at home.

questions.question: What lesson about childhood can we learn from Kalam’s story?
questions.answer: Childhood discipline, curiosity, and hard work can shape a person’s future.
